items.original_title: You have to delete sample workflow twice to submit a workflow via the ui
items.original_body:
## Summary 

1. Go to the workflows tab in the UI
2. Click 'Submit new workflow'
3. Click 'Edit using full workflow options'
4. Select all on the sample workflow yaml and press delete

issue:
The sample is not deleted.

Workaround:

1. Perform the steps above
2. Select all on the sample workflow a second time and press delete.

This time the sample is removed.


This is an issue because if you're running on autopilot, you end up pasting your required workflow into the box, but the past doesn't 'stick' and you end up running the sample workflow.

This occurs in both Chrome and Firefox (v86 and 89 respectively) on a Mac.

## Diagnostics

What Kubernetes provider are you using? EKS 1.19

What version of Argo Workflows are you running? 3.0 rc8

---
<!-- Issue Author: Don't delete this message to encourage other users to support your issue! -->
**Message from the maintainers**:

Impacted by this bug? Give it a 👍. We prioritise the issues with the most 👍.

This is an issue because if you're running on autopilot, you end up pasting your required workflow into the box, but the past doesn't 'stick' and you end up running the sample workflow.

items.original_body: Hello,\r\n\r\nDo you think it’s possible to auto-detect when the server is up instead or using an static defined timer? By trying to connect to it, or using rcon, for example.

items.original_title: [Bug] MAUI BlazorWebview app Crashes if there is a HTTP request
items.original_body:
### Description App crashes after Splash screen when calling any HTTP endpoint using `HttpClient` ( i think that's why it crashes because when i remove the requests it launches fine ) Below are the last debug log lines right before crashing ``` Loaded assembly: /data/data/com.microsoft.maui/files/.__override__/System.Security.Cryptography.Encoding.dll [External] Loaded assembly: /data/data/com.microsoft.maui/files/.__override__/System.Security.Cryptography.Primitives.dll [External] [monodroid] MonodroidRuntime::monodroid_pinvoke_override ("libSystem.Native", "SystemNative_FreeHostEntry") [monodroid] MonodroidRuntime::monodroid_pinvoke_override ("libSystem.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl", "AndroidCryptoNative_SSLStreamCreate") [monodroid] MonodroidRuntime::monodroid_dlopen ("libSystem.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl", 0x2, 0x0, 0x0) [monodroid-assembly] Caching p/invoke entry libSystem.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl @ AndroidCryptoNative_SSLStreamCreate [monodroid] MonodroidRuntime::monodroid_pinvoke_override ("libSystem.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl", "AndroidCryptoNative_SSLStreamCreate") [monodroid] MonodroidRuntime::monodroid_pinvoke_override ("libSystem.Security.Cryptography.Native.OpenSsl", "AndroidCryptoNative_SSLStreamCreate") [libc] Fatal signal 11 (SIGSEGV), code 1 (SEGV_MAPERR), fault addr 0x0 in tid 17554 (.NET ThreadPool), pid 17495 (.microsoft.maui) ``` ### Steps to Reproduce 1. `$ dotnet cake --target=VS-NET6` 2. on Visual Studio, set `Maui.Controls.Sample.Droid-net6` as startup project 3. add some http call to `Index.razor` ```razor @page "/" @inject HttpClient httpClient
Navigate: Home | Other

This is the count from HTTP API: @someCountFromAPI

@code { int someCountFromAPI = 0; protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() { try { // it could be any valid endpoint url var result = await httpClient.GetAsync($"https://someendpoint.com/api/count"); if (result.IsSuccessStatusCode) { var content = await result.Content.ReadAsStringAsync(); someCountFromAPI = int.Parse(content); } } catch { // nothing here } await base.OnInitializedAsync(); } } ``` 4. Launch debugging or without debugging on an Android emulator ( using Pixel 3 XL R 11.0 - API 30 ) 5. Crashes after splash screen ### Expected Behavior Launches app normally and http request works ### Actual Behavior App Crashes when there is a HTTP request ### Basic Information - Version with issue: pulled main branch - Last known good version: N/A - IDE: Visual Studio Community Version 16.10.0 Preview 3.0 - Platform Target Frameworks: Output from `maui-check` ``` > OpenJDK 11.0 Checkup... - 11.0.10 (C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-11.0.10.9-hotspot in\..) - 1.8.0-25 (C:\Program Files\Android\Jdk\microsoft_dist_openjdk_1.8.0.25) - 14.0.2 (C:\Program Files\AdoptOpenJDK\jdk-14.0.2.12-hotspot in\..) > Visual Studio 16.10.0-pre.2.1 Checkup... - 16.10.0-pre.3.0 - C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2019\Preview - 16.6.0 > Android SDK Checkup... - emulator (30.1.5) - build-tools;30.0.2 (30.0.2) - platforms;android-30 (3) - system-images;android-30;google_apis;x86 (9) - platform-tools (30.0.4) > Android Emulator Checkup... - Emulator: pixel_3a_xl_q_10_0_-_api_29 found. > .NET SDK Checkup... - 2.1.700 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\2.1.700 - 2.1.701 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\2.1.701 - 2.1.801 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\2.1.801 - 3.0.100 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\3.0.100 - 3.1.100 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\3.1.100 - 3.1.201 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\3.1.201 - 3.1.300 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\3.1.300 - 3.1.302 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\3.1.302 - 5.0.203 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\5.0.203 - 5.0.300-preview.21228.15 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\5.0.300-preview.21228.15 - 6.0.100-preview.4.21255.9 - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\6.0.100-preview.4.21255.9 > .NET SDK - EnableWorkloadResolver.sentinel Checkup... - C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2019\Preview\MSBuild\Current\Bin\SdkResolvers\Microsoft.DotNet.MSBuildSdkResolver\EnableWorkloadResolver.sentinel exists. - C:\Program Files\dotnet\sdk\6.0.100-preview.4.21255.9\EnableWorkloadResolver.sentinel exists. > .NET SDK - Workloads (6.0.100-preview.4.21255.9) Checkup... - microsoft-android-sdk-full (Microsoft.NET.Workload.Android : 11.0.200-preview.4.245) installed. - microsoft-ios-sdk-full (Microsoft.NET.Workload.iOS : 14.5.100-preview.4.638) installed. - microsoft-maccatalyst-sdk-full (Microsoft.NET.Workload.MacCatalyst : 14.5.100-preview.4.638) installed. - microsoft-tvos-sdk-full (Microsoft.NET.Workload.tvOS : 14.5.100-preview.4.638) installed. - microsoft-macos-sdk-full (Microsoft.NET.Workload.macOS : 11.3.100-preview.4.638) installed. > .NET SDK - Packs (6.0.100-preview.4.21255.9) Checkup... - Microsoft.Maui.Templates (6.0.100-preview.4.581) installed. - Microsoft.macOS.Templates (11.3.100-preview.4.638) installed. ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── - Congratulations, everything looks great! ``` ### Screenshots ### Reproduction Link ### Workaround Did not find any workaround

items.original_title: ldaps via 636 not usable / Feature Request?
items.original_body:
I configured the ldap authentication and it fails

Our LDAP Server is only reachable via 636 using SSL


### Expected behavior
- Connect Server via Port 636 using ldaps with ssl

### Actual behavior
- only using ldap with start tls on port 389
- not configurable

### Steps to reproduce
1. enable ldap auth
2. using a ldap server with only open port 636 ldaps


### GVM versions

GSM 20.08.6

### Environment

**Operating system:**


### Logfiles
gvmd from live log

Jan 20 xxx gvmd[24811]: StartTLS failed, trying to establish ldaps connection.
Jan 20 xxx gvmd[24811]: LDAP authentication failure: Can't contact LDAP server.
Jan 20 xxx gvmd[24811]: Authentication failure for 'YYYYYYY' from unix_socket

items.original_title: Bug-Missing *code* elements in .main-section-Project:Build a Technical Documentation Page
items.original_body:
# Content
## The .main-section elements should contain at least 5 *code* elements total (not each). 

There are not at least 5 *code* elements throughout all of the elements with the class of 'main-section' : expected 0 to be at least 5
AssertionError: There are not at least 5 *code* elements throughout all of the elements with the class of 'main-section' : expected 0 to be at least 5
 *at Proxy.p (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:549:3833)
 at Proxy.l (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:431:130)
 at Function.n.isAtLeast (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:574:1030)
 at a.<anonymous> (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:657:146302)
 at https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:38668
 at i.g.run (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:38963)
 at N.runTest (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:45686)
 at https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:46651
 at o (https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:45075)
 at https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/testable-projects-fcc/v1/bundle.js:598:45145*

**[My solution@codepen](https://codepen.io/neerajsehgal/pen/xxEYMZr)**

items.original_body: We need to use semantic versions for the "local" value; so this needs to become a pre-release and 0 must be greater than 1..0xFF.
items.mutated_body: We need to use semantic versions for the "local" dependency; so this needs to become a pre-release and 0 must be greater than 1..0xFF

items.original_body: When I open the app, it immediately crashes with a TypeError. Expected behavior: the app should show the home screen.
items.mutated_body: When I open the application, it immediately crashes with a TypeError. Expected behavior: the home screen should be shown.
